title: Spanish Paella with Makrut Lime Leaves
description: A twist on the classic Spanish dish, this paella features the unique flavor of makrut lime leaves.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the artichoke hearts, makrut lime leaves, and paella rice, and stir to combine.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the rice is coated in oil and slightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth, 1 cup at a time, stirring constantly until the liquid is absorbed.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Remove the paella from the heat and stir in the lime juice.
Let the paella rest for 5-10 minutes before serving.
